task.objective: Analyze and plan reorganization of lib/db.ts for better maintainability
task.background:
The current lib/db.ts is a large file (~2000+ lines) containing all database queries. This makes it difficult to: - Find where to make changes quickly - Understand which functions are related - Add new features without scrolling through unrelated code
Goal is to reorganize into a clearer structure that: - Groups related functions by domain/feature - Makes it obvious where to add new queries - Preserves all existing functionality (no breaking changes)

constraints.constraint: NO new abstractions unless clearly needed
NO breaking changes to existing API

task.success_criteria: - Clear map of current db.ts domains/groups - Proposed file structure for reorganization - Phase prompts for safe incremental migration

step.name: Function Inventory
step.action: 1. Read lib/db.ts completely 2. List ALL exported functions with brief description 3. Group functions by logical domain: - Executions (CRUD, search, summary) - Test Results (queries, history) - Flakiness (detection, history, summary) - Metrics (dashboard, trends, analytics) - Organizations/API Keys - Reliability/Performance - Comparison - Insert/Ingestion 4. Count lines per domain group
step.output: Document in investigation/analysis.md: - Function list with domain grouping - Lines of code per domain - Identified related functions that should stay together

step.name: Dependency Analysis
step.action: 1. Identify shared utilities (getSql, generateTestSignature, etc.) 2. Find internal function dependencies (which functions call others) 3. List all type imports from types.ts 4. Note any circular dependency risks
step.output: Add to investigation/analysis.md: - Shared utilities list - Internal dependency graph (simple) - Types used per domain

step.name: Propose File Structure
step.action: Design new file organization: ``` lib/db/ ├── index.ts # Re-exports everything (backwards compatible) ├── connection.ts # getSql, setServiceAccountContext ├── executions.ts # Execution queries ├── results.ts # Test result queries ├── flakiness.ts # Flakiness detection ├── metrics.ts # Dashboard metrics, trends ├── reliability.ts # Reliability score, performance ├── comparison.ts # Execution comparison ├── ingestion.ts # Insert functions └── utils.ts # Shared utilities ``` Validate this structure makes sense for the codebase.
step.output: Document in investigation/proposed-structure.md: - Final file structure - Which functions go in each file - Migration order (safest first)

step.name: Create Phase Prompts
step.action: Generate XML prompts for incremental migration: - Phase 1: Create lib/db/ folder with index.ts re-exporting from db.ts - Phase 2: Extract connection and utilities - Phase 3: Extract domain files one by one - Phase 4: Cleanup and verify

mandatory_final_step.description: Update the feature's status.md file with execution results. This step is MANDATORY and must be executed after all other steps.
mandatory_final_step.action:
After completing all investigation steps, UPDATE the file: docs/prompts/db-abstraction-refactor/status.md
with the following information: - Date: Get from system (date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") - Prompt: investigation/prompt.xml - Phase: Investigation - Status: completed | partial | blocked - Summary of findings - List of deliverables created - Next steps (link to first phase prompt) - Any blockers encountered

rules.rule: ALWAYS update status.md as the LAST action
Be specific about files created and decisions made
Link to phases/01_setup_structure.xml as next step
